chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition. No.D-184 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, For hearing of main case. 10.11.2021 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, A.A.G Sindh, = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the respondents be directed to consider the case of petitioner for her appointment in public service, on disable and/or on humanitarian grounds, which is opposed by learned A.A.G Sindh, by contending that the appointment in public service could only be made on merit after observance of due process. If the petitioner is carrying a feeling that she is a disable and is entitled to be appointed in public service against disable quota, then she may subject to qualification apply for her appointment in public service against disable quota, when the posts are advertised formally. No direction could be issued straight away for considering the case of petitioner for her appointment in public service on disable and/or on humanitarian grounds, by this Court, in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction, such direction, if issued, obviously would be contrary to law and due procedure necessary for appointment in public service. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J JUDGE
